dialogueChunks.intro: Justice is served, {player_name}. {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_has} been dealt with, and {quest_stakes_the} can begin to heal.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: What they did to {quest_focus_the} can be rebuilt. What matters is that the wrong has been answered. {quest_ally} says the settlement sleeps easier knowing someone held them accountable.
dialogueChunks.outro: You did not let a crime go unanswered. That takes conviction.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the nightmare is over. You managed to {quest_action}, and {quest_threat_the} will answer for what they did.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus_The} still bears the scars, but the people are stronger for having seen justice. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_has} been restored as much as possible.
dialogueChunks.outro: Vengeance can be a poison of its own, but what you brought us was not vengeance: it was justice. Thank you.

dialogueChunks.intro: It is finished, {player_name}. {quest_threat_The} can no longer harm {quest_stakes_the}. The crime has been answered.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} has already begun restoring {quest_focus_the}. The mood in the settlement has shifted: people feel safer, more confident. Your actions made that possible.
dialogueChunks.outro: You stood up when others looked away. That is the mark of a true ally.
